reasons: Acceptance criterion 'Final video exists' passed in end-to-end check: both runs produced runtime/stages/final/final_video.mp4 and hashes matched.
Acceptance criterion 'Report exists' passed in end-to-end check: both runs produced runtime/pipeline_report.json.

Acceptance criterion 'Deterministic outputs' failed: two runs with identical inputs produced different pipeline_report.json hashes (report1=1f4fe108efe9e00a9372bf956683082a3f69cbf74c80f3133b41e4bdf3a98a3c, report2=ca220859da109c58d26e34ac00b90e33c205769fbb100b90141d376ea04403aa).
Verification steps 'Run twice' and 'Compare outputs' failed overall because report output changed between identical runs despite matching final_video hashes.
run_commands:
cd projects/pipeline-runner && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const crypto=require('crypto');const {runPipeline}=require('./src/runner/run-pipeline');const root=fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(),'pr-e2e-'));const video=path.join(root,'input.bin');fs.writeFileSync(video,Buffer.from([9,8,7,6,5]));function hashFile(p){return crypto.createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(p)).digest('hex');}function stages(){return [{id:'ingest',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p.video_reference),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.video_reference,JSON.stringify({video_path:ctx.videoPath}));fs.writeFileSync(p.timeline,JSON.stringify({end:1,segments:[{start:0,end:1}]}));fs.writeFileSync(p.audio,'audio-src');return {ok:true};}},{id:'transcript',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p.translated_transcript),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.translated_transcript,JSON.stringify({segments:[{id:1,text:'x'}]}));return {ok:true};}},{id:'dubbing',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p.dubbed_audio),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.dubbed_audio,'dubbed-audio');return {ok:true};}},{id:'subtitle',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p.subtitle),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.subtitle,'1
00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000
hello
');return {ok:true};}},{id:'final',run:(ctx)=>{const p=ctx.paths.artifacts;fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(p.final_video),{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync(p.final_video,'final-video-deterministic');return {ok:true};}}];} const out1=path.join(root,'run1');const out2=path.join(root,'run2');const r1=runPipeline({videoPath:video,outputDir:out1,stages:stages(),pipelineReportPath:path.join(out1,'pipeline_report.json')});const r2=runPipeline({videoPath:video,outputDir:out2,stages:stages(),pipelineReportPath:path.join(out2,'pipeline_report.json')});if(!r1.ok||!r2.ok){console.error('pipeline_failed',r1,r2);process.exit(2);}const report1=path.join(out1,'pipeline_report.json');const report2=path.join(out2,'pipeline_report.json');const final1=path.join(out1,'stages','final','final_video.mp4');const final2=path.join(out2,'stages','final','final_video.mp4');for(const p of [report1,report2,final1,final2]){if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('missing_output',p);process.exit(3);}}const h={report1:hashFile(report1),report2:hashFile(report2),final1:hashFile(final1),final2:hashFile(final2)};if(h.report1!==h.report2||h.final1!==h.final2){console.error('nondeterministic',h);process.exit(4);}console.log('ok',JSON.stringify(h));"
summary: End-to-end validation for work_6_e2e_test found a determinism regression: pipeline_report.json differs across identical runs. Final video output is deterministic, but the report output is not, so acceptance criteria are not fully satisfied.
